query:
染秋 (RAN QIU) 秋季品牌。
 品牌理念：染秋以东方哲学观照自然更迭，意在捕捉秋日流转中的诗意瞬间。品牌从中国传统"染"的工艺美学出发，将秋天的色彩、气息、情绪凝练成可感知的香氛艺术。精选秋季时令植物——桂花、柿子、枫叶、乌龙茶，融合东方香料如肉桂、檀香、琥珀，创造温暖而隽永的秋日记忆。
核心系列：    以"染秋"为题，推出桂花乌龙、琥珀枫叶、柿霜暮色等香调，营造温暖治愈的秋日氛围。
制作品牌染秋的主色 + 辅色 + 字体规范展示图

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为染秋 (RAN QIU) 生成一张品牌视觉规范展示图，用于呈现主色、辅色与字体系统。

风格/介质:品牌设计规范图 / Brand Guidelines Sheet，极简留白，克制克制，参考原研哉式东方美学
主体:三栏式规范排版——左侧主色块(赤土橙或柿红)、中间辅色块(琥珀金、枫叶赭、桂米白)、右侧字体展示("染秋"中文字体与 RAN QIU 英文字体)，每色块标注色值与 Pantone 参考
构图:横向三分栏布局，上下留足呼吸空间，整体居中对齐，信息层级清晰
色彩搭配:主色(温暖赤土红/柿红)作为视觉锚点，辅色(琥珀金、赭石、米白)形成渐变过渡，整体呈现秋日温润质感
材质/纹理:哑光纸张质感，无光泽，色块边缘干净锐利
文字(原文保留):"染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
约束:色彩必须可印刷(Pantone 或 CMYK 标注)，字体需可商用授权，整体可适配包装/海报/电商等多场景
避免:渐变堆砌、霓虹色、塑料质感、Behance 通用模板风、过度装饰元素

Create an original brand color + typography specification sheet for RAN QIU, an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy.

Style/medium: clean editorial brand guidelines layout, Swiss-style grid system, Pantone-inspired color swatch presentation
Subject: brand color system (primary + secondary) and typography hierarchy for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" fragrance brand
Composition: top-down flat lay arrangement, three distinct zones — color swatches, typography specimens, and brand mark
Color palette: warm autumn tones — burnt sienna/amber as primary, muted ochre and sage green as secondary, cream/off-white background
Text (verbatim): "染秋 (RAN QIU)", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: colors must evoke autumn foliage and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics; typography must balance modern minimalism with subtle Eastern character
Avoid: generic gradient swatches; neon colors; overly decorative fonts; Western-centric autumn clichés like pumpkins; busy patterns

Use case: brand-guideline
Asset type: brand color + typography specification sheet, 1:1 square format
Primary request: visual brand system showcase for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" autumn fragrance brand
Scene/backdrop: clean minimalist layout with generous white space, subtle autumn leaf texture watermark
Subject: color swatches (primary + secondary palette) paired with Chinese typography specimens, elegant brand name "染秋" and "RAN QIU" displayed in both calligraphic and modern sans-serif treatments
Style/medium: refined editorial design, contemporary Chinese aesthetic, luxury beauty brand guideline
Composition/framing: grid-based layout, top section for primary/secondary color blocks with hex codes, middle section for Chinese type specimens, bottom section for English logotype
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, calm and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: warm autumn tones — persimmon orange, osmanthus gold, maple crimson, amber, sand beige, deep charcoal; muted earthy secondary palette
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, subtle grain, clean vector graphics
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色"
Constraints: must display primary color + secondary color + typography as three distinct sections, maintain elegant Chinese aesthetic, preserve all Chinese product names verbatim
Avoid: neon colors, cluttered layout, western-centric design, deformed Chinese characters, watermark
